mapper.insert: INSERT INTO m_user ( user_id, password, user_name, birthday, role) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{password}, #{userName}, #{birthday}, #{role})
mapper.select: SELECT user_id, password, user_name, birthday, role, version FROM m_user WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT user_id, password, user_name, birthday, role, version FROM m_user
mapper.update: UPDATE m_user SET password = #{password}, user_name = #{userName}, birthday = #{birthday}, role = #{role}, version = version + 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND version = #{version}
